raw_description:
The five star hotel is located in the heart of Al Ahsa, opposite King Faisal University, and is surrounded by the most famous local and international restaurants such as TGI Fridays, McDonald's, Hardee's, and KFC's more than 20 international and local restaurants.

The hotel features elegant suites with a classic feel of comfort, luxurious multi-use halls, indoor swimming pool, high-speed fiber optic internet access all over the place, a health club for men and women, sauna and Jacuzzi.

Every morning we will welcome you to a varied breakfast buffet at Al Ahsa's 11th floor restaurant, Al Nakheel Restaurant. We will also offer you a variety of international dishes for lunch and dinner as well as our prepared ice cream buffet.

You can also relax in the lobby and enjoy your favorite coffee from Pro Café.

We offer you free private parking as well as a paid delivery service to take you anywhere in Al Ahsa city. You will find all the staff happy to serve you and help you at any time.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.1for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Al Ahsa Grand Serviced Apartment. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Indoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Fitness centre.
